description: This file defines API views and viewsets for a defect management system, including CRUD operations, workflow transitions, overdue queries, CSV export, and dashboard metrics. It handles defect statuses, corrective actions, defect history, and 5-Why analysis, with business rules for defect state transitions and automatic status updates.

classes.name: WorkflowStatusViewSet
classes.description: CRUD API for managing workflow statuses.

classes.name: DefectViewSet
classes.description: Main CRUD API for defects, including status transitions, overdue filtering, and CSV export.

classes.name: FiveWhyAnalysisViewSet
classes.description: Create/update/retrieve 5-Why analysis linked to defects, with auto-transition to IN_ANALYSIS.

classes.name: CorrectiveActionViewSet
classes.description: CRUD API for corrective actions, with overdue filtering and automatic defect status updates.

classes.name: DefectHistoryViewSet
classes.description: Read-only access to defect history logs.

classes.name: DashboardViewSet
classes.description: Provides aggregated defect and action metrics for dashboard display.

methods.name: _pick_status_by_codes
methods.description: Selects the first active WorkflowStatus matching any of the provided codes.

methods.name: _defect_has_root_cause
methods.description: Checks if a defect has a non-empty root cause in its 5-Why analysis.

methods.name: _defect_actions_completion
methods.description: Returns counts of completed and total corrective actions for a defect.

methods.name: _auto_advance_defect_based_on_actions
methods.description: Automatically advances defect status if all corrective actions are completed.

methods.name: health
methods.description: Health check endpoint returning server status.
